name: Pricing Optimization Workflow
description: Analyze sales data, use business logic agents for pricing strategy, and update prices

steps.name: get_inventory_sales_data
steps.description: Retrieve sales and inventory data for analysis

config.query: Get all items with inventory quantity greater than 100 units, including sales data for the last 30 days, average daily sales, and current price

steps.name: pricing_analysis
steps.description: Use Pricing Agent to analyze and recommend optimal prices

config.query: Analyze pricing for items with high inventory and recommend markdown strategy to improve turnover while maintaining profitability

steps.name: inventory_analysis
steps.description: Use Inventory Agent to evaluate stock levels

config.query: Analyze current stock levels and identify overstocked items that need price adjustments

steps.name: create_decision_tree
steps.description: Create decision tree combining pricing and inventory insights

config.context: Combine pricing strategy and inventory analysis to create actionable pricing decisions

steps.name: evaluate_pricing_decisions
steps.description: Evaluate each item against the decision tree

steps.name: apply_price_updates
steps.description: Update prices in Square POS based on recommendations

items.note: Replace with actual item IDs and prices from evaluation step
